scripts.deploy:public: cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=/beejspray-fe-v2/ vite build --mode public && gh-pages -d dist/public
scripts.deploy:seller: cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=/beejspray-fe-v2/seller/ vite build --mode seller && gh-pages -d dist/seller -e seller
scripts.deploy:admin: cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=/beejspray-fe-v2/ vite build --mode admin && gh-pages -d dist/admin -e admin
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:public" "npm run dev:seller" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: vite build --mode public && vite build --mode seller && vite build --mode admin
